text: Every licensee under this chapter shall maintain all vehicles used in driver training in safe mechanical condition at all times.
markdown:
# Vehicle Code
## Division 5. OCCUPATIONAL LICENSING AND BUSINESS REGULATIONS [11100 - 12217]
### Chapter 1. Driving Schools and Driving Instructors [11100 - 11114]
##### § 11109

Every licensee under this chapter shall maintain all vehicles used in driver training in safe mechanical condition at all times.

*(Enacted by Stats. 1959, Ch. 3.)*

subsections.text: Every licensee under this chapter shall maintain all vehicles used in driver training in safe mechanical condition at all times.
